Title: Oktoberfest celebrations

URL Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations

Published Time: 2006-10-05T16:37:01Z

Markdown Content:
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

This article is about Oktoberfest celebrations around the world. For the original festival in Munich, see [Oktoberfest](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest "Oktoberfest").

| Oktoberfest |
| --- |
| [![Image 1](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/22/Oktoberfest_VGBelgrano.jpg/250px-Oktoberfest_VGBelgrano.jpg)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:Oktoberfest_VGBelgrano.jpg) [Oktoberfest](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest "Oktoberfest") in [Villa General Belgrano](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Villa_General_Belgrano "Villa General Belgrano"), Córdoba, Argentina |
| Observed by | Germany, the Americas, Oceania and the world |
| Type | Multinational |
| Significance | Celebration of Bavarian culture |
| Celebrations | Parades, food, music, folkloric dancing |
| Date | Third Saturday in September |
| 2025 date | September 20 |
| 2026 date | September 19 |
| 2027 date | September 18 |
| 2028 date | September 16 |
| Duration | 16 days |
| Frequency | Annual |
| Related to | [Oktoberfest](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest "Oktoberfest") |

The [Oktoberfest](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest "Oktoberfest") is a two-week festival held each year in [Munich](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Munich "Munich"), Germany during late September and early October. It is attended by six million people each year and has inspired numerous similar events using the name _Oktoberfest_ in Bavaria and around the world.

Outside of Germany, three Oktoberfest events claim to be the largest after Munich’s, with over 700,000 visitors annually: the one in [Blumenau](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Blumenau "Blumenau"), Brazil;[[1]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-Blumenau-1) the one in [Cincinnati, Ohio](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cincinnati,_Ohio "Cincinnati, Ohio"), United States (700,000-800,000+ visitors);[[2]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-2) and the one in [Kitchener, Ontario](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kitchener,_Ontario "Kitchener, Ontario") (formerly Berlin) and surrounding cities in [Waterloo Region](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Waterloo_Region "Waterloo Region"), Canada.

Other larger Oktoberfests include the Denver Oktoberfest [Denver, Colorado](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Denver,_Colorado "Denver, Colorado"), United States (450,000+ visitors).[[3]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-3) In New York City, there is even an Oktoberfest held under a big tent along the city's East River.[[4]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-4) However, the largest one mostly depends on specific year's numbers and varies with sources.[[5]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-Top10-5) Currently Oktoberfest is spreading to new geographical locations; starting in September 2007, [Montreal](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Montreal "Montreal") began hosting its own Oktoberfest. One can find Oktoberfest celebrations mixing German traditions, food and beer with local culture outside of Germany.[[6]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-6)

The [National Beer Festival](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/National_Beer_Festival "National Beer Festival") (Fiesta Nacional de la Cerveza) is [Argentina](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Argentina "Argentina")'s version of the German Oktoberfest. It has taken place every October since 1963 in [Villa General Belgrano](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Villa_General_Belgrano "Villa General Belgrano"), Córdoba. The party emerged by the hand of the first German immigrants. This festival attracts thousands of tourists for two consecutive weekends.

In Australia, the [universities](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_universities_in_Australia "List of universities in Australia") are notorious in their celebrations of Oktoberfest every year, and as students graduated and moved on, this rolled over into pubs and restaurants in the university areas. After the 2012 Oktoberfest Party the [University of New South Wales](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/University_of_New_South_Wales "University of New South Wales") council banned the celebration of the festival on university campus grounds.[[7]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-7)

Following the end of many of the university based events a private event company, Nokturnl Events, launched 'Oktoberfest in the Gardens'[[8]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-8) in the [Supreme Court Gardens](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Supreme_Court_Gardens "Supreme Court Gardens"), Perth on 7 October 2011. The event has since expanded to Adelaide, Melbourne and Sydney. The event now attracts over 50,000 patrons annually making it the largest Oktoberfest celebration in Australia.

Royal Melbourne Oktoberfest[[9]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-9) is held within the world heritage listed [Royal Exhibition Building](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Royal_Exhibition_Building "Royal Exhibition Building") in Melbourne. Oktoberfest In The Gardens[[10]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-10) is held in [Melbourne Showgrounds](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Melbourne_Showgrounds "Melbourne Showgrounds"). Sydney also have their instalment of this event located within [Australian Technology Park](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Australian_Technology_Park "Australian Technology Park").

The [Harmonie German Club](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harmonie_German_Club "Harmonie German Club"), Canberra, holds an Oktoberfest over a three-day period every year in October. The festival has been held for over 50 years, and attracts a large number of visitors from Canberra and surrounding regions.[[11]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-harmonie-cbr-11) In 2017 the event moved over the border to [Queanbeyan](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Queanbeyan "Queanbeyan") in New South Wales and was held on 27 – 29 October.[[12]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-cbr-times-first-oktfest-12)[[13]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-can-times-fest-qby-13)

[Brisbane](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brisbane "Brisbane") celebrates its annual [Brisbane Oktoberfest](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Brisbane_Oktoberfest&action=edit&redlink=1 "Brisbane Oktoberfest (page does not exist)"), which is considered Australia's largest German festival. It is held over the first two weekends in October and offers a variety of German beers, wines and food, beer hall music and dance and singing performances.

Since 1984, an annual Oktoberfest celebration has been held in the seaside village of [Emu Park](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Emu_Park "Emu Park") on Queensland's [Capricorn Coast](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Capricorn_Coast "Capricorn Coast"). The event is held in the town's [Bell Park](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bell_Park,_Emu_Park "Bell Park, Emu Park") and is organised by the local [Lions Club](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lions_Club_International "Lions Club International").[[14]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-14)[[15]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-15)

In Brazil there are several Oktoberfests around the country, most of them in towns settled by Germans and Austrians in the [Southern](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/South_Region,_Brazil "South Region, Brazil") portion of the country (like the [Oktoberfest of Blumenau](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_of_Blumenau "Oktoberfest of Blumenau"), the [Oktoberfest of Itapiranga](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Itapiranga,_Santa_Catarina "Itapiranga, Santa Catarina"), the [Oktoberfest of Igrejinha](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Igrejinha "Igrejinha"), the [Oktoberfest of Santa Cruz do Sul](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_of_Santa_Cruz_do_Sul "Oktoberfest of Santa Cruz do Sul"), the [Oktoberfest of Rolândia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rol%C3%A2ndia "Rolândia"), the [Oktoberfest of São Jorge d'Oeste](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/S%C3%A3o_Jorge_d%27Oeste "São Jorge d'Oeste"), [the Oktoberfest of Ponta Grossa](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ponta_Grossa "Ponta Grossa"), the [Oktoberfest of Marechal Cândido Rondon](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marechal_C%C3%A2ndido_Rondon "Marechal Cândido Rondon"), among others). There are also Oktoberfests in other portions of the country (like the [Oktoberfest in der Altstadt von Olinda](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Olinda "Olinda"), the Oktoberfest Cearense in [Guaramiranga](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Guaramiranga "Guaramiranga"), the Oktoberfest do Club Transatlântico and the Oktoberfest do Brooklin in [São Paulo](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/S%C3%A3o_Paulo "São Paulo"), among others). The Oktoberfest of Blumenau is one of the largest German festivals around the world, attracting around one million people every year.

In Canada there is an annual nine-day celebration spread over 18 days in [Kitchener, Ontario](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kitchener,_Ontario "Kitchener, Ontario"). It attracts over 700,000 visitors annually.[[16]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-16) While its most popular draws are the [beer](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Beer "Beer")-based celebrations, other cultural and entertainment attractions also fill the week. The most well-known is the parade held on [Thanksgiving Day](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Thanksgiving_(Canada) "Thanksgiving (Canada)"). As the only major parade on [Canadian Thanksgiving](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Canadian_Thanksgiving "Canadian Thanksgiving"), it is televised nationally. Coincidentally, the closing day of the Bavarian Oktoberfest also falls on the German equivalent of Thanksgiving, _[Erntedankfest](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Erntedankfest "Erntedankfest")_.

The twin cities and surrounding area have a long history of German roots. Kitchener was [formerly named Berlin](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Berlin_to_Kitchener_name_change "Berlin to Kitchener name change"). A significant portion of the population of Kitchener and surrounding areas identify themselves as being of German descent, and many still speak [German](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/German_language "German language"). A common phrase at the celebrations is [Gemütlichkeit](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gem%C3%BCtlichkeit "Gemütlichkeit"), German for congeniality, or warm friendliness.

Oktoberfest celebrations are also held annually in [Sherbrooke, Quebec](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sherbrooke,_Quebec "Sherbrooke, Quebec") at the beginning of October. The one night event is held by [Université de Sherbrooke](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Universit%C3%A9_de_Sherbrooke "Université de Sherbrooke")'s Engineering Students' Association. It draws approximately 6,000 revellers each year.[[17]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-17)

Two smaller events take place in the [Greater Toronto Area](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Greater_Toronto_Area "Greater Toronto Area"):

*   [Toronto Oktoberfest](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Toronto_Oktoberfest&action=edit&redlink=1 "Toronto Oktoberfest (page does not exist)")[[18]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-18) at [Ontario Place](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ontario_Place "Ontario Place")
*   Unionville Oktoberfest Heritage Days[[19]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-19) in [Unionville, Ontario](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Unionville,_Ontario "Unionville, Ontario")

In Chile bierfests are celebrated in [Valdivia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bierfest_Valdivia "Bierfest Valdivia"), [Puerto Octay](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Puerto_Octay "Puerto Octay"), [Puerto Varas](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Puerto_Varas "Puerto Varas"), [Frutillar](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frutillar "Frutillar") and [Llanquihue](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Llanquihue_Province "Llanquihue Province") and [Malloco](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Malloco&action=edit&redlink=1 "Malloco (page does not exist)").

*   [Qingdao](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qingdao "Qingdao"), with its [Qingdao International Beer Festival](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qingdao_International_Beer_Festival "Qingdao International Beer Festival"), has the largest Oktoberfest celebration in all of China with celebrations since 1991. Around 4 million have participated.[[20]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-20)
*   [Beijing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Beijing "Beijing"), held at the Paulaner Brauhaus in the Kempinski Hotel[[21]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-21) since 1993.[[22]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-22)
*   [Shanghai](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shanghai "Shanghai"), at the Paulaner Brauhaus[[23]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-23) and held since 1997.[[24]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-24)
*   In [Anting](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anting "Anting") New Town, designed with German-style elements and architecture, Oktoberfest (and other German holidays) are celebrated as community events.[[25]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-:2-25): 129 
*   [Hong Kong](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hong_Kong "Hong Kong"), [Marco Polo German Bierfest](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Marco_Polo_German_Bierfest&action=edit&redlink=1 "Marco Polo German Bierfest (page does not exist)") has been held since 1992. The celebration takes place in mid October to early November at Marco Polo Hong Kong Hotel in [Harbour City](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harbour_City_(Hong_Kong) "Harbour City (Hong Kong)"), Tsim Sha Tsui.[[26]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-26) Other events also take place in other spots in Hong Kong: 
    *   Oktoberfest at Happy Valley Racecourse[[27]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-cnn.com-27)
    *   Erdinger Oktoberfest at Indian Recreation Club[[27]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-cnn.com-27)

*   [Macau](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Macau "Macau")[MGM Macau](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/MGM_Macau "MGM Macau") hosted their first Oktoberfest in 2011[[27]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-cnn.com-27)

In Colombia it is sponsored by [Bavaria Brewery](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bavaria_Brewery_(Colombia) "Bavaria Brewery (Colombia)"). A series of concerts and events are held along different cities, with special emphasis in those with German background like [Bucaramanga](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bucaramanga "Bucaramanga").

Oktoberfest celebrations have become very popular with Indian hotels, restaurants and malls. Numerous such events happen in Indian metros in October. The most significant one is held since 2009 by the [Indo-German Chamber of Commerce](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Indo-German_Chamber_of_Commerce "Indo-German Chamber of Commerce") in [Pune](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pune "Pune"), traditionally a large hub of German companies in India.[[28]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-28)[[29]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-29)

Yokohama Japan holds an Oktoberfest celebration annually from late September through mid-October at its historic Red Brick Warehouse.[[30]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-30)

Oktoberfest has been celebrated in [Penang](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Penang "Penang") and [Kuala Lumpur](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kuala_Lumpur "Kuala Lumpur") since the 1970s. Celebrations are said to be the liveliest in Penang, with annual festivities organised by the Malaysian German Society.[[31]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-31) Since 2017, the Oktoberfest celebrations in Penang have included non-alcoholic beverages alongside beer.[[32]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-32)

An Oktoberfest celebration is held in the town of [Taybeh](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taybeh,_Ramallah "Taybeh, Ramallah"), in the ([Taybeh Brewery](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taybeh_Brewery "Taybeh Brewery")). The first Taybeh Oktoberfest was held in 2005.[[33]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-33)

Oktoberfest beer and music festival celebrations held usually from September up to December. It is organized by [San Miguel Brewery](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/San_Miguel_Brewery "San Miguel Brewery"), which is the makers of [San Miguel Beer](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/San_Miguel_Beer "San Miguel Beer") and other alcoholic beverages. The 2015 edition of their Oktoberfest, was coincided with the 125th anniversary of San Miguel Beer Pale Pilsen.[[34]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-34)

*   [Moscow](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Moscow "Moscow") Oktoberfest is held [Red Square](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Red_Square "Red Square").[[35]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-35)

Oktoberfest is celebrated annually in mid September at various German schools around the country most notably the Deutsche Schule Pretoria.

Oktoberfest celebration is held in [Colombo](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Colombo "Colombo"), Sri Lanka every year.[_[citation needed](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation\_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")_]

[German-Americans](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/German-American "German-American") are the largest self-reported ancestral group in the United States, and despite many German-Americans not having Bavarian ancestry, Oktoberfest is observed as a "typically German" celebration. There are hundreds of large and small Oktoberfest celebrations held annually throughout the country, the largest being [Oktoberfest Zinzinnati](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_Zinzinnati "Oktoberfest Zinzinnati") in [Cincinnati](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cincinnati "Cincinnati"), Ohio.

[![Image 2](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/e1/Oktoberfest_in_Redwood_City%2C_California.JPG/250px-Oktoberfest_in_Redwood_City%2C_California.JPG)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:Oktoberfest_in_Redwood_City,_California.JPG)

Oktoberfest in Redwood City, California

[![Image 3](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c5/TulsaOktoberfest2014.jpeg/250px-TulsaOktoberfest2014.jpeg)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:TulsaOktoberfest2014.jpeg)

Oktoberfest in [Tulsa, Oklahoma](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tulsa,_Oklahoma "Tulsa, Oklahoma")

[![Image 4](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/e3/DeutschesHaus12Oct07Oktoberfestchickendance1.jpg/250px-DeutschesHaus12Oct07Oktoberfestchickendance1.jpg)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:DeutschesHaus12Oct07Oktoberfestchickendance1.jpg)

Oktoberfest celebrations in [New Orleans](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/New_Orleans "New Orleans")

[![Image 5](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/d4/Oktoberfest_Zinzinnati_20240921_180919814.jpg/250px-Oktoberfest_Zinzinnati_20240921_180919814.jpg)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:Oktoberfest_Zinzinnati_20240921_180919814.jpg)

Oktoberfest Zinzinnati in [Cincinnati](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cincinnati "Cincinnati")

Known for its large German immigrant population, the Commonwealth of [Pennsylvania](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pennsylvania "Pennsylvania") and its historic [Pennsylvania Dutch](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pennsylvania_Dutch "Pennsylvania Dutch") (Pennsylvania Deutsch) population are well known to have many Oktoberfest celebrations during the months of September and October. These celebrations became increasingly popular among the general Commonwealth population in the later half of the 20th century with the rise of microbreweries, and with the opening of authentic German brew houses such as Hofbräuhaus in Pittsburgh, PA.

Other major celebrations across the United States include those at:

*   [Old World Oktoberfest](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Old_World_Village#Festivals "Old World Village") in [Huntington Beach, CA](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Huntington_Beach,_CA "Huntington Beach, CA")
*   [Cullman, Alabama](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cullman,_Alabama "Cullman, Alabama");
*   [Nashville, Tennessee](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nashville,_Tennessee "Nashville, Tennessee")'s oldest-running festival is the Nashville Oktoberfest,[[36]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-36) in the downtown Germantown neighborhood. In 2015, more than 140,000 people attended.[[37]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-37) In 2016, official attendance was estimated as over 215,000 people, making the Nashville Oktoberfest the second largest in the USA.[[38]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-38)
*   [Tempe Town Lake](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tempe_Town_Lake "Tempe Town Lake") in [Tempe, Arizona](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tempe,_Arizona "Tempe, Arizona")
*   [Margaret T. Hance Park](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Margaret_T._Hance_Park "Margaret T. Hance Park") in [Phoenix, Arizona](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Phoenix,_Arizona "Phoenix, Arizona")[[39]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-39)
*   The Phoenix Club in [Anaheim, California](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anaheim,_California "Anaheim, California")
*   [Big Bear City, California](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Big_Bear_City,_California "Big Bear City, California")
*   [Campbell, California](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Campbell,_California "Campbell, California")
*   [Chico, California](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chico,_California "Chico, California") Located at Sierra Nevada Brewing Co..
*   [Oakland, California](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oakland,_California "Oakland, California")
*   [Sacramento, California](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sacramento,_California "Sacramento, California")
*   [San Francisco](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/San_Francisco "San Francisco"), California
*   Alpine Village in [West Carson, California](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/West_Carson,_California "West Carson, California")
*   [San Diego](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/San_Diego "San Diego"), California
*   [Montrose, California](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Montrose,_California "Montrose, California")
*   [Denver](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Denver "Denver"), Colorado
*   The Colorado Council of Arts, Science and Culture hosts Parker Oktoberfest[[40]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-40) in [Parker, Colorado](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Parker,_Colorado "Parker, Colorado")[[41]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-41)
*   the [Delaware Sängerbund](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Delaware_S%C3%A4ngerbund "Delaware Sängerbund") in [Newark, Delaware](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Newark,_Delaware "Newark, Delaware")
*   [Wickham Park (Melbourne, Florida)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wickham_Park_(Melbourne,_Florida) "Wickham Park (Melbourne, Florida)")
*   [Cape Coral, Florida](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cape_Coral,_Florida "Cape Coral, Florida") (largest in Florida)
*   [Miami, Florida](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Miami,_Florida "Miami, Florida")
*   [Helen, Georgia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Helen,_Georgia "Helen, Georgia"), a Bavarian-themed town
*   Hofbrauhaus Chicago in [Rosemont, Illinois](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rosemont,_Illinois "Rosemont, Illinois"), a German celebration, starting in 2013, expecting many beer lovers
*   [Indianapolis, Indiana](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Indianapolis,_Indiana "Indianapolis, Indiana")
*   [Jasper, Indiana](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jasper,_Indiana "Jasper, Indiana")
*   [Seymour, Indiana](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Seymour,_Indiana "Seymour, Indiana")
*   [Amana, Iowa](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Amana,_Iowa "Amana, Iowa")
*   [Hays, Kansas](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hays,_Kansas "Hays, Kansas")
*   [Danville, Kentucky](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Danville,_Kentucky "Danville, Kentucky")
*   [Mandeville, Louisiana](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mandeville,_Louisiana "Mandeville, Louisiana")
*   [Frankenmuth, Michigan](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frankenmuth,_Michigan "Frankenmuth, Michigan") (The first Oktoberfest outside Munich that the Parliament and the City of Munich sanctioned);[[42]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-42)
*   [Grand Rapids, Michigan](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Grand_Rapids,_Michigan "Grand Rapids, Michigan")[[43]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-43)
*   [New Ulm, Minnesota](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/New_Ulm,_Minnesota "New Ulm, Minnesota") (In 2002 the Census Bureau released a report showing 65.85% of population with German ancestry, the greatest proportion among US cities).
*   [Jefferson City, Missouri](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jefferson_City,_Missouri "Jefferson City, Missouri")
*   [Hermann, Missouri](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hermann,_Missouri "Hermann, Missouri")
*   [St. Louis, Missouri](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/St._Louis,_Missouri "St. Louis, Missouri")
*   [Hattiesburg, Mississippi](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hattiesburg,_Mississippi "Hattiesburg, Mississippi")
*   [Norfolk, Nebraska](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Norfolk,_Nebraska "Norfolk, Nebraska")[[44]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-44)
*   [Sidney, Nebraska](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sidney,_Nebraska "Sidney, Nebraska")
*   [Germania Park](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Germania_Park "Germania Park") in [Rockaway Township, New Jersey](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rockaway_Township,_New_Jersey "Rockaway Township, New Jersey")
*   [Red River, New Mexico](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Red_River,_New_Mexico "Red River, New Mexico")
*   [Irondequoit, New York](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Irondequoit,_New_York "Irondequoit, New York")
*   [Hickory, North Carolina](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hickory,_North_Carolina "Hickory, North Carolina")
*   the [Ohio State Fair](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ohio_State_Fair "Ohio State Fair") grounds and the Germania Singing and Sport Society in [Columbus, Ohio](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Columbus,_Ohio "Columbus, Ohio")
*   [Berea, Ohio](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Berea,_Ohio "Berea, Ohio")
*   [Minster, Ohio](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Minster,_Ohio "Minster, Ohio")
*   [Wilmington, Ohio](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wilmington,_Ohio "Wilmington, Ohio")
*   [Tulsa, Oklahoma](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tulsa,_Oklahoma "Tulsa, Oklahoma")
*   [Mt. Angel, Oregon](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mt._Angel,_Oregon "Mt. Angel, Oregon"); Mt. Angel has held an Oktoberfest (in September) since 1966.[[45]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-usa-mt-angel-45)
*   Sertoma Field in [Walhalla, South Carolina](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Walhalla,_South_Carolina "Walhalla, South Carolina")
*   [Saxonburg, Pennsylvania](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Saxonburg,_Pennsylvania "Saxonburg, Pennsylvania"), Sprankle's Octoberfest (Weekend after Labor Day) since 2019.[[46]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-spranklesoctoberfest-46)
*   [East Allegheny (Pittsburgh)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/East_Allegheny_(Pittsburgh) "East Allegheny (Pittsburgh)"), Pennsylvania
*   [Reading, Pennsylvania](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Reading,_Pennsylvania "Reading, Pennsylvania")
*   [Newport, Rhode Island](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Newport,_Rhode_Island "Newport, Rhode Island")
*   [Kingsport, Tennessee](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kingsport,_Tennessee "Kingsport, Tennessee")
*   [Addison, Texas](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Addison,_Texas "Addison, Texas")
*   [Boerne, Texas](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Boerne,_Texas "Boerne, Texas")
*   [Fredericksburg, Texas](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fredericksburg,_Texas "Fredericksburg, Texas")
*   [Galveston, Texas](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Galveston,_Texas "Galveston, Texas")
*   [New Braunfels, Texas](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/New_Braunfels,_Texas "New Braunfels, Texas") (called Wurstfest). Began in 1961. Attendance typically ranges from 125,000 to 200,000 people.
*   [Slaton, Texas](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Slaton,_Texas "Slaton, Texas") ("Slaton Saint Joseph Sausage Festival," held on the third Sunday of October)
*   [Shiner, Texas](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shiner,_Texas "Shiner, Texas")
*   at least 11 other Texas towns[[47]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-txalmanac-47)
*   [Snowbird, Utah](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Snowbird,_Utah "Snowbird, Utah"), a resort in the mountains above Salt Lake City
*   [Lovettsville, Virginia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lovettsville,_Virginia "Lovettsville, Virginia");
*   [Martinsville, Virginia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Martinsville,_Virginia "Martinsville, Virginia")
*   neighborhood of [Fremont, Seattle](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fremont,_Seattle "Fremont, Seattle"), Washington
*   [Leavenworth, Washington](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Leavenworth,_Washington "Leavenworth, Washington"), a Bavarian-themed town
*   [Appleton, Wisconsin](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Appleton,_Wisconsin "Appleton, Wisconsin")
*   [La Crosse, Wisconsin](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/La_Crosse,_Wisconsin "La Crosse, Wisconsin"), called [Oktoberfest, USA](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_%E2%80%93_La_Crosse,_Wisconsin "Oktoberfest – La Crosse, Wisconsin")
*   [New Glarus, Wisconsin](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/New_Glarus,_Wisconsin "New Glarus, Wisconsin")
*   [Milwaukee, Wisconsin](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Milwaukee,_Wisconsin "Milwaukee, Wisconsin")
*   many others[[48]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-48)

Oktoberfest celebrations are co-organized annually by the German Business Association in [Hanoi](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hanoi "Hanoi") and [Ho Chi Minh City](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ho_Chi_Minh_City "Ho Chi Minh City").[[49]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-49) In 2012, Oktoberfest Vietnam in Ho Chi Minh City celebrated its 20th year with a seven-day event.[[50]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-50)

In [Venezuela](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Venezuela "Venezuela"), specifically in [Colonia Tovar](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Colonia_Tovar "Colonia Tovar"),[[51]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-51) it is held annually since 1970. Sometimes music groups have been invited from Germany to interpret typical music. The Historic center of Colonia Tovar has a population of about 10,000 inhabitants and it is estimated that during the days of the event the town receives twice that in visitors. In [Greater Caracas](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Greater_Caracas "Greater Caracas"), it's celebrated in the suburb of [El Hatillo](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/El_Hatillo_Municipality "El Hatillo Municipality"),[[52]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-52)[[53]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-53) it's sponsored by the embassy of Germany and Poland, and the German-speaking Catholic Community.

Oktoberfest is celebrated annually in [Zambia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zambia "Zambia") around 10 October at Fringilla, [Chisamba](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chisamba "Chisamba"), Central Province and many other various locations in [Lusaka](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lusaka "Lusaka").[_[citation needed](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation\_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")_]

Note that traditional [fairs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fair "Fair") in Bavaria, called _Dult_, _[Volksfest](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Volksfest "Volksfest")_ (popular festival) etc., are similar to the Oktoberfest in nature (not in size), but not called Oktoberfest as they did not arise in imitation of it. Of these, the [Gäubodenvolksfest](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/G%C3%A4ubodenvolksfest "Gäubodenvolksfest") of [Straubing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Straubing "Straubing") enjoys particular fame.

##### Munich - The Original

[[edit](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Oktoberfest_celebrations&action=edit&section=24 "Edit section: Munich - The Original")]

[![Image 6](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/46/Oktoberfest_in_Munich%2C_Germany.jpg/250px-Oktoberfest_in_Munich%2C_Germany.jpg)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:Oktoberfest_in_Munich,_Germany.jpg)

Oktoberfest in Munich, Germany

[![Image 7](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/67/20050925-oktoberfest-hannover-archway.jpg/250px-20050925-oktoberfest-hannover-archway.jpg)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:20050925-oktoberfest-hannover-archway.jpg)

An entrance arch to Hanover Oktoberfest in 2005

The [Hanover](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hanover "Hanover") Oktoberfest is a fair that takes place every year at the end of September or at the beginning of October.[[54]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-54) It usually lasts 17 days and features 140 rides and booths, two large beer tents seating more than a thousand people each, and numerous stands, beer gardens and five small beer tents offering food and refreshments. The program consists of a [dirndl](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dirndl "Dirndl") competition, three [fireworks](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fireworks "Fireworks"), two family days, a [hand lantern parade](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Laternelaufen "Laternelaufen") for kids and a backstage tour. You can get a special festival-beer from the local brewery [Herrenhäuser Brewery](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Herrenh%C3%A4user_Brewery "Herrenhäuser Brewery"), the [Lüttje Lage](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=L%C3%BCttje_Lage&action=edit&redlink=1 "Lüttje Lage (page does not exist)")[[de](https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/L%C3%BCttje_Lage "de:Lüttje Lage")] (an alcoholic speciality of Hannover) and many foods from Lower Saxony and Bavaria. With around one million visitors each year, it is the second-largest Oktoberfest in Germany.

Oktoberfest in Berlin continues to grow. Several large areas, including Alexanderplatz and Zentraler Festplatz, are turned into Bavarian-like beer and food tents. Live brass Bavarian bands play at venues around town and people can be seen in traditional Bavarian dress around the city. Many places also serve the official Oktoberfest beers that are made in Munich. These events last from mid-September to early-mid October, and are the largest Oktoberfest events outside of Munich.[[55]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oktoberfest_celebrations#cite_note-55)

[![Image 8](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/0d/FDP21.jpg/250px-FDP21.jpg)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:FDP21.jpg)

Festival of Good Beer in [Wrocław](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wroc%C5%82aw "Wrocław"), Poland

*   [Beer festival](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Beer_festival "Beer festival")
*   [Cannstatter Volksfest](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cannstatter_Volksfest "Cannstatter Volksfest") - Volksfest held in the [Swabian](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Swabia "Swabia") city of Stuttgart at a similar time of year to Oktoberfest
*   [German diaspora](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/German_diaspora "German diaspora")

*   [Oktoberfest in Shanghai, China](http://www.oktoberfestshanghai.com/)

But religious politicians in this country want it banned"](https://edition.cnn.com/travel/article/malaysia-oktoberfest-religious-controversy-intl-hnk/index.html). _[CNN](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/CNN "CNN")_. Retrieved 19 Dec 2024.
